meta.title: Source Connection Types
meta.desc: Reference card listing the source def kinds supported by the demo task executor.

kinds.description: Look up a key in the built-in MOCK_DB dictionary and return static JSON.
Invoke GitHub Copilot CLI using copilot.prompt_template (or top-level prompt_template shorthand) with {{key}} interpolation from _projections and args.
Invoke WorkIQ (Microsoft 365 Copilot) using workiq.query_template with {{key}} interpolation. Requires workiq CLI + az login.
Single URL fetch via curl with {{key}} interpolation from _projections. Supports method, headers, args, tickersFrom, and cacheTimeout (seconds).
Fan-out fetch over _projections.url_list (string[]), returning an array of raw JSON responses. Supports method, headers, and cacheTimeout.
